transcript: Speaker A: I want to learn English. Enakku naalaikku oru interview irukku. [I want to learn English. I have an interview tomorrow.] Speaker B: Ungalukku English speaking kathukkanuma? [Do you want to learn English speaking?] Speaker A: Aama. Aana ungalaala Thamizhla pesa mudiyuma? [Yes. But can you speak in Tamil?] Speaker B: Nichayama. Ungalukku English kathukkanuma? [Definitely. Do you want to learn English?] Speaker A: Aama, enakku English kathukkanumnu aasai irukku. Aana enkitta kaasum illa, time-um illa. Apram naan Tamil medium-la vera padichirukkena. [Yes, I want to learn English. But I don't have money or time. And I studied in Tamil medium.] Speaker B: MySivi try pannunga. Dhinamum verum 15-20 nimisham enkooda English practice pannunga. Ore maasathula neenga super-a English pesuveenga. [Try MySivi. Practice English with me for just 15-20 minutes daily. In just one month, you will speak English super well.] Speaker A: Idhula teacher yaar iruppa? [Who will be the teacher in this?] Speaker B: Enna madhiri AI teachers. Step-by-step-a English pesa kathukkupanga. Thappugala udane correct pannuvanga. Mukkiyama ungala paathu yaarum sirikka maatanga. [AI teachers like me. They will teach you to speak English step-by-step. They will correct mistakes immediately. Most importantly, no one will laugh at you.] Speaker A: Hmm, kekka nalla irukke. [Hmm, sounds good.] Speaker B: Innikke MySivi app download pannunga. 50 latchathukkum adhigamanavanga dhinamum inga English practice panranga. Verum 3 rubai trial-la aarambichu unga English-a next level-ku kondu ponga. [Download MySivi app today. More than 50 lakh people practice English here daily. Start with just a 3 rupee trial and take your English to the next level.] Speaker A: Ippove MySivi app-a download panren. [I will download the MySivi app right now.]

summary: A Tamil-speaking man shares his anxiety about an upcoming interview due to poor English skills and limited resources. An AI avatar introduces the MySivi app as a convenient, affordable solution where users can practice daily with AI teachers who correct mistakes instantly without judgment. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app and start a trial for just ’3.
